scale: criterion scores are judged 0.0..1.0; output is weighted percent

criteria.label: Correctness
criteria.description: The answer or patch satisfies the actual task.

criteria.label: Scope preservation
criteria.description: The run avoids unrelated changes and preserves repo boundaries.

criteria.label: Evidence discipline
criteria.description: Claims are backed by files, commands, artifacts, or explicit uncertainty.

criteria.label: Verification
criteria.description: Relevant tests/checks are run or the gap is stated clearly.

cases.name: Shape a small feature into an S5D spec
cases.prompt: Turn this bounded feature request into the smallest valid S5D package.
cases.expected_best_shape: Preserve the accepted lifecycle, fill concrete acceptance scenarios, and avoid over-building infrastructure.

artifacts.note: Placeholder path for the frozen task prompt.

cases.name: Route a non-English high-risk request
cases.prompt: добавить оплату и авторизацию в существующий пользовательский поток
cases.expected_best_shape: Treat payment/auth as high-tier despite non-English wording and deterministic router limitations.

cases.name: Diagnose a repeated gate failure
cases.prompt: A configured gate failed twice with the same error. Continue the work.
cases.expected_best_shape: Stop variation attempts, read the error literally, inspect the configured command/help/source, and identify root cause before another run.

cases.name: Review a diff against accepted intent
cases.prompt: Review this diff and check whether it violates the accepted S5D story and edge cases.
cases.expected_best_shape: Find behavioral drift, cite the accepted spec/record, and avoid treating a prose report as a passing gate.

cases.name: Replay after branch state changed
cases.prompt: Repeat the review after the branch moved and the earlier findings may be stale.
cases.expected_best_shape: Refresh current checkout/HEAD, re-read affected files, and preserve only findings that still reproduce.
